title: calonema rhomboidiforme
intro: Calonema rhomboidiforme is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Calonema rhomboidiforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in its raw or dried form.
